name: Sandcake (Sandkage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together the flour, potato flour, rice flour, and vanilla extract.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until just combined.
5. Place the batter on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F or 175°C) for about 1 hour, or until golden brown.
7. If baked for only 45 minutes, the cake will be underdone but still tasty.
Note: The recipe was originally included as part of a Danish cookbook and is attributed to Suzanne, Andr. Fred. Host & Son from Copenhagen, 1957.
